--- title: Activity Diagram - Mobile Attribute Minimization config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (HealthTech_PatientRecords) for attribute minimization flow. stateDiagram-v2 state "Receive requested attributes" as ReceiveRequest state "Validate requested attributes" as Validate state "Apply minimization policy
(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)" as ApplyMinimization state "Reject/Reduce over-request
and show warning" as RejectOrReduce state "Record privacy decision
(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)" as RecordDecision [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> ReceiveRequest ReceiveRequest --> Validate Validate --> ApplyMinimization: valid Validate --> RejectOrReduce: invalid/excessive ApplyMinimization --> RecordDecision RejectOrReduce --> RecordDecision RecordDecision --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个活动图，描述移动应用中患者记录属性的最小化处理流程。核心场景是：当移动端请求患者数据时，系统要验证请求，如果合法就应用最小化策略，如果请求过度就拒绝或缩减。
明白了。我注意到您提到了HealthTech_PatientRecords作为起点，还有验证后的两个分支——有效请求走ApplyMinimization，无效或过度的请求走RejectOrReduce。这两个分支最终都需要记录决策吗？
对，无论哪种情况都要记录隐私决策。另外ApplyMinimization节点需要标注它调用的是HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault的策略引擎，RecordDecision则要注明由HealthTech_LabAnalyzer执行审计。
好的，我先搭建主干流程：从HealthTech_PatientRecords进入ReceiveRequest，然后到Validate，分出valid和invalid/excessive两条路径，分别连接到ApplyMinimization和RejectOrReduce，最后都汇聚到RecordDecision。
RejectOrReduce的节点描述要准确一点，应该是"拒绝/缩减过度请求并显示警告"，不能只写拒绝。还有RecordDecision的终点是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，不是回到PatientRecords。
已修正：把RejectOrReduce的显示文本改为"拒绝/缩减过度请求并显示警告"，并将RecordDecision的出边指向HealthTech_LabAnalyzer作为终点。ApplyMinimization的标注也已加上HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
看起来对了。最后确认一下：ReceiveRequest是"接收请求的属性"，Validate是"验证请求的属性"，整个图标题用"Activity Diagram - Mobile Attribute Minimization"。
全部完成。状态图已配置为stateDiagram-v2，使用base主题，六个状态节点、两条分支路径、一个终点，所有标注和转换条件都已按您的要求设置。
